news.title: Georgia film tax fraud: Southwest Georgia men guilty in $550K scheme
news.summary: Two Tifton men face decades in prison after pleading guilty in a Southwest Georgia film tax fraud scheme involving $550,000 in fake refunds.

news.title: Dead bat tests positive for rabies in south DeKalb County
news.summary: A dead bat tested positive for rabies in DeKalb County after being found near Columbia Drive and York Place on Tuesday.

news.title: Conyers police chase: Two arrested after hotel car break-ins
news.summary: Conyers police arrested two men following a vehicle pursuit linked to at least 28 hotel car break-ins in Conyers.

news.title: Hampton drive-by shooting: Police search for Deodar Lane suspects
news.summary: Henry County police are investigating a Hampton drive-by shooting after a home was hit by gunfire Wednesday morning.

news.title: Doraville Police: Suspect called 911 to say she shot someone
news.summary: Officers arrived at the scene and located who they said was the shooter. She was taken into custody.

news.title: Butts County drone contraband bust: Deputies intercept prison delivery on I-75
news.summary: A traffic stop on Interstate 75 in Butts County uncovered a large drone packed with drugs, electronics and weapons bound for Ware State Prison.

news.title: Atlanta police issue plea for calm after dispute leads to quadruple shooting
news.summary: Atlanta police are investigating a shooting on Joseph E. Lowery Blvd. NW that left four men injured Wednesday afternoon.

news.title: Death investigation underway at Paulding County home, sheriff says
news.summary: Authorities launched a death investigation Wednesday following a discovery at a Dallas home in the 30 block of Palace Point.

news.title: 4 people shot in Atlanta's Bankhead neighborhood, police say
Months of man being accused of exposing himself across Atlanta ends in arrest
news.summary: Christian Johnson, 34, was accused of exposing himself to women and girls in at least five neighborhoods.

news.title: Immigration agents take people into custody at future Norcross police site
news.summary: A Gwinnett County woman is searching for her husband after witnesses say federal immigration agents took four people into custody at a city construction site.

news.title: 4 shot in northwest Atlanta, police say
news.summary: Police are investigating a shooting in northwest Atlanta that has left multiple people injured.

news.title: 2 men charged, 3rd on run after breaking into cars, starting 134 mph metro Atlanta police chase
news.summary: The Conyers Police Department has two suspects in custody related to a series of car break-ins at three hotels.

news.title: Death investigation underway in Paulding County neighborhood
news.summary: Authorities are currently investigating a death in a Paulding County neighborhood.

news.title: Doraville shooting leaves man dead; woman arrested after 911 call
news.summary: A woman was taken into custody after calling 911 to report she had shot a man, who later died of his injuries, at a Doraville apartment complex Wednesday morning.

news.title: 2 arrested in sexual assault cases connected to metro Atlanta apartment complex
news.summary: Flowery Branch police have arrested two suspects following investigations into multiple reported sexual assaults.

news.title: Police investigating after 62-year-old shot and killed
news.summary: An adult male was found dead at a home in DeKalb County late Tuesday night.

news.title: Eight murder suspects among 10 inmates accused in Fulton County Jail shank attack
news.summary: The victim was on the phone when the June 1 attack began. Investigators said each of the 10 alleged attackers had a homemade knife.
